dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4530 : To amend chapters 83 and 84 of title 5, United States Code, to authorize an increase of the retirement age for members of the Capitol Police.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell (for himself and Mr. Padilla) introduced the following bill; which was read twice, considered, read the third time, and passed

form.official-title: To amend chapters 83 and 84 of title 5, United States Code, to authorize an increase of the retirement age for members of the Capitol Police.

section.header: Authorization to increase retirement age for member of the Capitol Police

subsection.text: Section 8335(c) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by striking becomes 60 years of age and inserting attains an age determined by the Board, which shall be not less than 57 years of age and not more than 62 years of age.

Section 8425(c) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by striking becomes 60 years of age and inserting attains an age determined by the Board, which shall be not less than 57 years of age and not more than 62 years of age.
